content.full_text:
May 26, 1992

Mr. Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel  
State of California  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, California 95804-0814

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

I am interested in forming a slate mailer organization, as a current County Central Committee Member and a candidate for re-election, I question whether I am entitled to do so. The purpose of the slate mailer organization is solely that of a business enterprise and would not list me as a candidate.

I am in possession of advice letter #-l-90546 which touches on this issue, but does not specifically apply to my situation. Please advice me of your legal opinion concerning this matter.

Sincerely,

Johnnie Morgan
